title: Where can I find Resend documents like DPA or W-9?
excerpt: > ## Documentation Index > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://resend.com/docs/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. # Where can I find Resend documents like DPA or W-9? > How to download compliance and tax documents from your Resend account. Resend keeps your account's compliance and tax documents in one place: [Settings → Documents](https://resend.com/settings/documents). You must be logged in to your Resend account to access the [Documents](https://resend.com/settings/documents) page. ## What's on the page * **Penetration test**: Penetration testing is performed at least annually by third-party cybersecurity company Oneleet. The Letter of Attestation is available to download.…
